title: Conflict Diagnosis and Semantic Resolution · Repository Repair Bay
summary: Resolve an integration conflict by reconstructing both intents and verifying behavior rather than deleting markers until Git accepts the file. Learners isolate plausible failures, compare competing hypotheses, and record cause-level repair evidence. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in a conflict reproduction, resolution, and regression record and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case pract…
objectives: Inspect unmerged index stages, ours/theirs/base terminology, paths, and operation context before editing.
Read conflict markers and diff views while obtaining surrounding base and commit intent.
Construct a new result from requirements, tests, and both histories rather than treating resolution as text selection.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.shell:
# git-basics cumulative repository evidence notebook
# Git operations change only disposable simulated repository state.
# Inspect status, diffs, graph, refs, and recovery before every mutation.

steps.title: Inspect the failure record
steps.instruction:
debug case — Merge conflict in policy.txt has base limit=2, main limit=2, and repair limit=3 plus retry tests. Inspect index stages, reconstruct intent, create a semantic result, and verify before continue. Competency probe: Inspect unmerged index stages, ours/theirs/base terminology, paths, and operation context before editing.

Inspect the Conflict Stages trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for inspect unmerged index stages, ours/theirs/base terminology, paths, and operation context before editing.

content.text: For Conflict Stages, distinguish a claim from evidence by locating the relevant precondition, trace or invariant, and changed input result.

hints: Name the Conflict Stages precondition or invariant that the debug case must preserve.

Trace this concrete case before choosing: Merge conflict in policy.txt has base limit=2, main limit=2, and repair limit=3 plus retry tests. Inspect index stages, reconstruct intent, create a semantic result, and verify before continue. Competency probe: Inspect unmerged index stages, ours/theirs/base terminology, paths, and operation context before editing.
Use the documented misconception as a counterexample target: Ours always means the feature branch and theirs always means main.

stimulus.title: Conflict Stages case record
stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: Merge conflict in policy.txt has base limit=2, main limit=2, and repair limit=3 plus retry tests. Inspect index stages, reconstruct intent, create a semantic result, and verify before continue. Competency probe: Inspect unmerged index stages, ours/theirs/base terminology, paths, and operation context before editing.

lines.label: risk
lines.text: Ours always means the feature branch and theirs always means main.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Inspect unmerged index stages, ours/theirs/base terminology, paths, and operation context before editing. Artifact under review: a conflict reproduction, resolution, and regression record.

options.text: The record names the assumption, applies Conflict Stages, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.

The Conflict Stages record says a conflict reproduction, resolution, and regression record looks right but supplies no governing condition, observation, changed case, or counterexample. This does not resolve inspect the failure record.

For inspect the failure record, apply Conflict Stages without its stated preconditions, omit the a conflict reproduction, resolution, and regression record trace and counterexample, and treat one plausible output as complete proof. This does not satisfy Conflict Stages for a conflict reproduction, resolution, and regression record.

steps.title: Implement the cause-level repair
steps.instruction: Append a safe repository investigation headed "# Evidence: git-rerere-regression-skrp71" with a concrete hypothesis, one bounded simulator command, and an observation that changes the next decision.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Rerere Regression into observable performance evidence.

content.code:
# Evidence: git-rerere-regression-skrp71
# hypothesis: [replace with one falsifiable cause]
# command: choose one bounded simulator observation
# observation: [replace with the result that changes the next decision]
content.caption: Shape of the required increment; replace generic language with the current stakeholder case.

content.title: Evidence is more than syntax
content.text: The Rerere Regression structural check is only one gate. a conflict reproduction, resolution, and regression record must also survive the stated changed case and causal explanation.

hints: Name the Rerere Regression precondition or invariant that the debug case must preserve.

Trace this concrete case before choosing: Merge conflict in policy.txt has base limit=2, main limit=3, and repair limit=4 plus retry tests. Inspect index stages, reconstruct intent, create a semantic result, and verify before continue. Competency probe: Record or reuse conflict resolutions only after verifying context, tests, and changed-case behavior.
Use the documented misconception as a counterexample target: rerere can safely accept every repeated textual resolution without review.

steps.title: Publish the incident record
steps.instruction: Write the debug evidence note for Rerere Regression: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — Merge conflict in policy.txt has base limit=2, main limit=5, and repair limit=6 plus retry tests. Inspect index stages, reconstruct intent, create a semantic result, and verify before continue. Competency probe: Record or reuse conflict resolutions only after verifying context, tests, and changed-case behavior.
steps.why: Retrieving Rerere Regression through the concrete a conflict reproduction, resolution, and regression record case exposes causal gaps that recognition alone can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Record or reuse conflict resolutions only after verifying context, tests, and changed-case behavior.
